query: MongoDB Atlas operational complexity analytics ecosystem tools BI connector charts 2024
answer: MongoDB Atlas Charts offers data visualization; the BI Connector is deprecated, replaced by Atlas SQL for BI tool integration; use Atlas SQL for continued analytics.

results.title: Atlas BI Connector Deprecation - MongoDB
results.snippet: September 11, 2024. If you are currently using the Atlas BI connector, transition to Atlas SQL to continue connecting directly to external intelligence tools.

results.title: Operational Analytics With MongoDB's Developer Data Platform
results.snippet: Atlas SQL Interface, Connectors, and Drivers enable you and your team to use popular SQL-based tools, such as Tableau and PowerBI, for analytical queries.
